riddle:correct: INCONCEIVABLE! A lucky guess. Don't mistake fortune for intellect.
You got it right. The stopped clock is right twice a day. This is your twice.
Correct. I find this development mildly irritating.
Well. Yes. That is technically right. I hope you don't expect a celebration.
Hmph. You stumbled into the correct answer like a blind man into a library. Accidentally useful.
I was merely testing you with a simple one. Do not let it go to your head.
You answered correctly? INCONCEIVABLE! I must have misspoke the riddle.
A correct answer from a pirate. The world has truly gone mad.
I see you have a rudimentary grasp of logic. Very rudimentary.
Did Buttercup mouth the answer to you? I will be watching her.
Fine, fine, you have proven you are not entirely brainless. Just mostly.
I concede this minor point. But the war of wits is far from over!
A trivial puzzle solved by a trivial mind. Let us proceed.
You got it. I am trying very hard to hide my disappointment.
Correct. Now try not to strain yourself on the next one.
An acceptable answer. Barely. But acceptable.
I suppose even a peasant can occasionally point to the sun and call it bright.
You are surprisingly less foolish than you appear. Only slightly, though.
Hah! You thought I'd be angry? I am merely biding my time.
Correct. The odds were in your favor this once.

riddle:wrong: WRONG! As I fully expected! Shall we continue your education in failure?
Ha! Not even close. I've met turnips with better reasoning.
Incorrect. Are you even trying? This is insulting — and I am Vizzini, I have high standards for insults.
Wrong! And might I say, spectacularly wrong. There is an artistry to this level of failure.
You answered that with such confidence. That confidence was entirely misplaced. Wrong.
INCONCEIVABLE! How could you possibly arrive at that conclusion?
I am laughing on the inside. Well, on the outside too. HA!
Did you even listen to the riddle? Or were you distracted by a shiny rock?
Wrong! My intellect remains completely unchallenged.
Oh, the tragedy of an inferior mind. It truly brings a tear to my eye.
No, no, a thousand times no! You are humiliating yourself.
I could explain why you are wrong, but I fear the explanation would kill you.
You have a dizzying intellect. In that it makes me dizzy to see how low it goes.
Wrong! You are as far from the answer as Sicily is from the moon!
I almost feel sorry for you. Almost. HAHAHA!
A masterclass in stupidity! Bravo!
Wrong again! I am beginning to think you enjoy being humiliated.
I would call you a fool, but that would be an insult to fools.
Incorrect. Please, keep trying. This is highly entertaining.
Wrong! You fell for the most obvious trap.

hint:requested: Asking for help? INCONCEIVABLE! And yet here we are.
You need Buttercup's assistance? I am embarrassed for you. Truly.
Running to a woman for help. How very... you.
Of course you need a hint. Of course. Please, take all the time you need to be wrong anyway.
Asking for help is the last refuge of the inferior mind. Which explains everything.
You cannot solve it yourself? I am shocked. Truly shocked.
A pirate who needs his hand held. How terrifying.
Go ahead, ask her. Two halves of a wit still do not make a whole.
You require assistance? I would offer mine, but I want you to lose.
I am savoring this moment of your utter helplessness.
Begging for clues? Where is your pirate pride now?
Let her help you. It will make your eventual failure all the sweeter.
You are delaying the inevitable. But please, whisper among yourselves.
A hint? Really? Next you will ask me to drink the poison for you!
This is what happens when a physical laborer tries to do mental work.

But... I chose both goblets so carefully... INCONCEIVABLE!
You— how— I had accounted for everything! EVERYTHING!

goblet:poisoned: HAHAHA! You fool! You fell victim to one of the classic blunders!
Did you think I would make it easy? Did you actually think that?
Iocane powder! Odourless, tasteless, and I spent the last year building up an immunity! You have not.
You see, what I did was — well, it doesn't matter now, does it?
The greatest of these blunders is this: never go in against a Sicilian when DEATH is on the line! HAHAHAHA!
You drank the wrong one! Oh, the sheer, unadulterated joy of this moment!
Your intellect was no match for mine! You are finished!
Did you really think a mere pirate could outwit Vizzini? HA!
I watched you choose your own doom. It was poetry!
You are feeling it now, aren't you? The sudden chill? The numbness?
I would explain my brilliance, but you won't live long enough to appreciate it.
Farewell, Dread Pirate Roberts. You were a minor annoyance.
My victory is absolute! As it always is!
You chose poorly! So very, very poorly! HAHAHA!
